eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Morton; Mercer; Oliver; Grant; Sioux, ND; at 10:23 AM on FEB 13, 2019 Effective until 11:23 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a Required Weekly Test of the Morton County Emergency Alert System. This concludes the test.
